title: Failure Classification, Retry Budgets, Backoff, and Load Shedding
description: Every exception is requeued immediately, permanent schema failures block healthy work, a database outage causes a retry storm, and attempt counts exist only in process memory. Learners cumulatively produce failure taxonomy and bounded retry policy through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Classify malformed, unauthorized, missing dependency, rate limit, timeout, conflict, transient, permanent, and ambiguous effect failures by evidence.
Bound attempts, total age, delay, processing deadline, queue residence, and operator escalation as one retry budget.
Apply exponential backoff and jitter without blocking consumer slots or requeueing hot loops and preserve intended availability time.
